prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-PARACORDBELT-BLACK Product Type: APPAREL_BELT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Universal Fit Black Survival 550 Paracord Belt with Stainless Steel Buckle, 52 inch Description: Having a good, solid rope could come in handy in just about any outdoor emergency situation, so why not keep some around your waist?

Be prepared for any adventure turned emergency with this every day survival gear ASR Outdoor 550 Survival Paracord Duty Belt. Ideal for both essential preparedness and tactical applications, you never know when you'll have to improvise in the field. With over 100 feet of unraveled paracord you can rig a tent, make a fire-starter bow, set snares, go fishing, repair gear, and much more. There are many creative places to store paracord but wearing it around your waist is one of the the most practical. Use the unraveled paracord to tie a load to the roof of your car, hang your gear from a tree while camping or even make a sling in a pinch to get off a mountain in a real emergency.

These survival gear paracord belts are constructed of highly durable Milspec 550 Tactical Paracord; is made from 7 strands of 100% genuine Mil-Spec 550lb parachute cord. The same stuff used by the US Military. It has a breaking strength of 550lbs with a working load of 220lbs. The overall thickness of the parachute cord line is 5/32" diameter and has a consistent stretch of just 10% elongation under loaded weight in product tests.

Each wilderness survival belt features a stainless steel belt buckle, that locks in your desired waist length at any interval you desire. These paracord belts are a universal fit as they are very adjustable; no pre-made belt holes, just stick the belt clasp through the paracord weave wherever it fits most comfortably for best fit.

Beef up your bug out bag with this essential piece of daily wear gear, the ASR Outdoor black paracord belt. Search Terms: paracord 550 survival belt outdoor gift for men edc gear one size fits all extra large camping gear outdoor tactical buckle tool belt Features: - UNIVERSAL FIT MENS BELT: One size fits all; 52 inches in total length; extra length can be tucked within belt loops or cut to fit while singeing the ends; very adjustable and comfortable; no pre-made belt holes, just stick the belt clasp through the paracord weave wherever it fits most comfortably for best fit - PARACORD BELT SPECIFICATIONS: Unraveled Total Length: 110 feet; Belt Waist Length: 52 inches; Belt Width: 1.5 inches; Stainless Steel Belt Buckle; Color: Black Paracord Belt - THE ULTIMATE EDC SURVIVAL BELT: Unravel the paracord braided weave to provide a rope source of strong survival cord at your disposal to craft a weapon, build a stretcher, fish for food, build a shelter and much more - FASHIONABLE DESIGN: While being highly dependable and extremely versatile this piece of survival gear can be worn everyday for when the most unexpected situations may arise - EASY TO MAINTAIN: Fully washable, easy to clean; wash, rinse and repeat; can be run through the washing machine and air dried === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 80 characters. Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available. === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 52in Black 550 Paracord Survival Belt
